The temperature at A is 4°C higher than that at B

question_text: The statement 'When an integer is added to itself, the sum is greater than the integer' is
options: true only when the integer is positive
answer_key: true only when the integer is positive

subject: Mathematics
question_text:
Write the opposite of each of the following:
(a) Decrease in size
(b) Failure
(c) Profit of Rs.10
(d) 1000 A.D.
(e) Rise in water level
(f) 60 km south
(g) 10 m above the danger mark of river Ganga
(h) 20 m below the danger mark of the river Brahmaputra
(i) Winning by a margin of 2000 votes
(j) Depositing Rs.100 in the Bank account
(k) 20°C rise in temperature
answer_key:
(a) Increase in size
(b) Success
(c) Loss of Rs.10
(d) 1000 B.C.
(e) Fall in water level
(f) 60 km north
(g) 10 m below the danger mark
(h) 20 m above the danger mark
(i) Losing by a margin of 2000 votes
(j) Withdrawing Rs.100
(k) 20°C fall in temperature
answer_explanation: Each statement has a natural opposite.
